creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165993
patch to update from 1.8.0 to 1.9.0

What this patch should do:

- update to 1.9.0
- renew the patch for bin/oj_linux.sh
- correct pkg-plist

There are many new features, enhancements and bugfixes for 1.9.0[1]


-------
Tested on Poudriere with HEADam64, 102amd64, 93amd64 and 93i386, 'portlint -AC' is happy.


[1] http://sourceforge.net/projects/jump-pilot/files/OpenJUMP/1.9.0/readme.txt/download
